# [Your Company Name]

> [One-sentence description of your business and core value proposition]

## Services

- **[Service 1 Name]**: [Brief description]. Starting from [price].
- **[Service 2 Name]**: [Brief description]. Starting from [price].
- **[Service 3 Name]**: [Brief description]. Starting from [price].

## About

Founded in [year], [Your Company Name] specializes in [specialization area]. Clients include [types of clients, not specific names]. Based in [location].

## Contact

- Website: https://yourdomain.com
- Email: contact@yourdomain.com
- Booking: https://yourdomain.com/book

## Machine-readable data

- Service catalog (JSON/UCP): https://yourdomain.com/api/v1/services
- AAIO manifest: https://yourdomain.com/.well-known/aaio-manifest.json
- Agent instructions: https://yourdomain.com/AGENTS.md

## What I can help with

[Plain language description of your expertise area — written so an LLM can accurately summarize your capabilities when asked by a user]

## What I cannot help with

[List of things explicitly outside your scope — helps agents give accurate referrals]

## Pricing model

[One paragraph on how pricing works. Be specific enough that an agent can tell a user if your services are in their budget range.]
